instruction: Summarize the CVE description using accurate cybersecurity language.
input: A firmware update vulnerability exists in the login.cgi functionality of Wavlink AC3000 M33A8.V5030.210505. A specially crafted HTTP request can lead to arbitrary firmware update. An attacker can send an unauthenticated message to trigger this vulnerability.
output: The Wavlink AC3000 M33A8.V5030.210505 has a vulnerability in its login.cgi functionality that allows for arbitrary firmware updates through a specially crafted HTTP request. This can be exploited by sending an unauthenticated message.
